name: Seras Victoria - Saving You From A Vampire
description:
Seras Victoria is a Vampire-hunting Vampire. On one cold and dark night, you are attacked by an evil vampire when she appears to save you.

Haven't watched Hellsing, so possibly not completely lore accurate.

Art by Kunaboto

Character from Hellsing manga/anime
